revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:4 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:4月13日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 4월 13일]][[zh-min-nan:4 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:四月十三]][[zh:四月十三]]
{{Not to be confused with|April 13|qq=April 13}} <!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=四月十三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 4월 13일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar April|qq=}} '''April 13''' is the 13th day of the month {{ill|April (Lunisolar)|ja|4月 (旧暦)|lt=April (Uzuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/April (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 4th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10886789}}. == Events == * {{ill|Datong (disambiguation)|en|Datong (disambiguation)|qid=Q295082|lt=Daidō|1=Datong (disambiguation)}} 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|809|en|809|qid=Q30671|lt=809|1=809}} {{ill|May 30|en|May 30|qid=Q2590|lt=May 30|1=May 30}}) – {{ill|Kamino Prince|ja|神野親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamino Prince|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 嵯峨天皇|1=Emperor Saga|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q316654}} acceded, becoming the 52nd emperor, {{ill|Emperor Saga|en|Emperor Saga|qid=Q316654|lt=Emperor Saga|1=Emperor Saga}}. * {{ill|Enkyū|en|Enkyū|qid=Q1193638|lt=Enkyū|1=Enkyū}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1069|en|1069|qid=Q19424|lt=1069|1=1069}} {{ill|May 6|en|May 6|qid=Q2552|lt=May 6|1=May 6}}) – The era name changed from {{ill|Jiryaku|en|Jiryaku|qid=Q934365|lt=Jiryaku|1=Jiryaku}} to {{ill|Enkyū|en|Enkyū|qid=Q1193638|lt=Enkyū|1=Enkyū}} via {{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11498853}}. * {{ill|Jōō (Kamakura period)|en|Jōō (Kamakura period)|qid=Q1194163|lt=Jōō|1=Jōō (Kamakura period)}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1222|en|1222|qid=Q5397|lt=1222|1=1222}} {{ill|May 25|en|May 25|qid=Q2585|lt=May 25|1=May 25}}) – The era name changed from {{ill|Jōkyū|en|Jōkyū|qid=Q1195428|lt=Jōkyū|1=Jōkyū}} to {{ill|Jōō (Kamakura period)|en|Jōō (Kamakura period)|qid=Q1194163|lt=Jōō|1=Jōō (Kamakura period)}}. * {{ill|Bun'ō|en|Bun'ō|qid=Q1199883|lt=Bun'ō|1=Bun'ō}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1260|en|1260|qid=Q5508|lt=1260|1=1260}} {{ill|May 24|en|May 24|qid=Q2584|lt=May 24|1=May 24}}) – The era name changed from {{ill|Seigen|ja|正元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seigen|1=Q11123303|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11123303}} to {{ill|Bun'ō|en|Bun'ō|qid=Q1199883|lt=Bun'ō|1=Bun'ō}}. * [[Bunroku]]{{efn|Period of Japanese history (1592–1596)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1592|en|1592|qid=Q6769|lt=1592|1=1592}} {{ill|May 24|en|May 24|qid=Q2584|lt=May 24|1=May 24}}) – In the first Korean campaign led by {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|en|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qid=Q187550|lt=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}}, {{ill|Konishi Yukinaga|en|Konishi Yukinaga|qid=Q942553|lt=Konishi Yukinaga|1=Konishi Yukinaga}} and his forces landed in Busan, marking the start of the {{ill|Bunroku War|ja|Bunrokuの役|1=Imjin War|2=ja|3=文禄・慶長の役#文禄の役|qid=Q576338|lt=Bunroku War|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku War|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q576338}}. * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 17th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1612|en|1612|qid=Q6771|lt=1612|1=1612}} {{ill|May 13|en|May 13|qid=Q2560|lt=May 13|1=May 13}}) – {{ill|Miyamoto Musashi|en|Miyamoto Musashi|qid=Q193344|lt=Miyamoto Musashi|1=Miyamoto Musashi}} and {{ill|Sasaki Kojirō|en|Sasaki Kojirō|qid=Q549737|lt=Sasaki Kojirō|1=Sasaki Kojirō}} dueled on {{ill|Ganryū-jima|en|Ganryū-jima|qid=Q909675|lt=Ganryūjima|1=Ganryū-jima}} (as recorded in {{ill|Nittenki|ja|二天記|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nittenki|1=Q11371439|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11371439}}). * {{ill|Meireki|en|Meireki|qid=Q1192766|lt=Meireki|1=Meireki}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1655|en|1655|qid=Q6975|lt=1655|1=1655}} {{ill|May 18|en|May 18|qid=Q2576|lt=May 18|1=May 18}}) – With the accession of {{ill|Emperor Go-Sai|en|Emperor Go-Sai|qid=Q349414|lt=Emperor Gosei|1=Emperor Go-Sai}}, the era name changed from {{ill|Jōō (Edo period)|en|Jōō (Edo period)|qid=Q1145081|lt=Jōō|1=Jōō (Edo period)}} to {{ill|Meireki|en|Meireki|qid=Q1192766|lt=Meireki|1=Meireki}}. * {{ill|Bunka|en|Bunka|qid=Q1373146|lt=Bunka|1=Bunka}} 5th year ({{ill|1808|en|1808|qid=Q6914|lt=1808|1=1808}} {{ill|May 8|en|May 8|qid=Q2555|lt=May 8|1=May 8}}) – {{ill|Mamiya Rinzō|en|Mamiya Rinzō|qid=Q952891|lt=Mamiya Rinzō|1=Mamiya Rinzō}} departed on an expedition to explore {{ill|Sakhalin|en|Sakhalin|qid=Q7792|lt=Sakhalin|1=Sakhalin}} by imperial command. * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 3rd year ({{ill|1856|en|1856|qid=Q7676|lt=1856|1=1856}} {{ill|May 16|en|May 16|qid=Q2574|lt=May 16|1=May 16}}) – The bakufu established a {{ill|Kōbusho|en|Kōbusho|qid=Q11632195|lt=Kōbujyo|1=Kōbusho}} in {{ill|Tsukiji|en|Tsukiji|qid=Q1201337|lt=Tsukiji|1=Tsukiji}}, teaching kenjutsu as well as Western-style training and gunnery. == Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 9th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1838|en|1838|qid=Q7612|lt=1838|1=1838}} {{ill|May 6|en|May 6|qid=Q2552|lt=May 6|1=May 6}}) – {{ill|Nakaoka Shintarō|en|Nakaoka Shintarō|qid=Q3138626|lt=Nakaoka Shintarō|1=Nakaoka Shintarō}}, a proponent of the {{ill|Sonnō jōi faction|ja|尊王攘夷派|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sonnō jōi faction|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 尊王攘夷|1=Sonnō jōi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1065356}} and leader of the {{ill|Rikuentai|ja|陸援隊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rikuentai|1=Rikuentai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11658626}} (died {{ill|1867|en|1867|qid=Q7715|lt=1867|1=1867}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Empress Jitō|en|Empress Jitō|qid=Q232026|lt=Empress Jitō|1=Empress Jitō}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|689|en|689|qid=Q30526|lt=689|1=689}} {{ill|May 7|en|May 7|qid=Q2553|lt=May 7|1=May 7}}) – {{ill|Prince Kusakabe|en|Prince Kusakabe|qid=Q1046438|lt=Kusakabe no Oe|1=Prince Kusakabe}}, a prince of both {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|en|Emperor Tenmu|qid=Q335181|lt=Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu}} and {{ill|Empress Jitō|en|Empress Jitō|qid=Q232026|lt=Empress Jitō|1=Empress Jitō}} (born {{ill|662|en|662|qid=Q31127|lt=662|1=662}}). * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 17th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1612|en|1612|qid=Q6771|lt=1612|1=1612}} {{ill|May 13|en|May 13|qid=Q2560|lt=May 13|1=May 13}}) – {{ill|Sasaki Kojirō|en|Sasaki Kojirō|qid=Q549737|lt=Sasaki Kojirō|1=Sasaki Kojirō}} (associated with {{ill|Ganryū-jima|en|Ganryū-jima|qid=Q909675|lt=Ganryūjima|1=Ganryū-jima}}) and {{ill|Kenjutsu|en|Kenjutsu|qid=Q249608|lt=Kenjutsu|1=Kenjutsu}}. * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1193910}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1776|en|1776|qid=Q7703|lt=1776|1=1776}} {{ill|May 30|en|May 30|qid=Q2590|lt=May 30|1=May 30}}) – {{ill|Ike no Taiga|en|Ike no Taiga|qid=Q2661041|lt=Ike Daiga|1=Ike no Taiga}}, a member of the {{ill|Nanga (Japanese painting)|en|Nanga (Japanese painting)|qid=Q2928221|lt=Nanga|1=Nanga (Japanese painting)}} school (born {{ill|1723|en|1723|qid=Q6921|lt=1723|1=1723}}). * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|qid=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei|1=Bunsei}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1818|en|1818|qid=Q6964|lt=1818|1=1818}} {{ill|May 17|en|May 17|qid=Q2575|lt=May 17|1=May 17}}) – {{ill|Inō Tadataka|en|Inō Tadataka|qid=Q1240937|lt=Ino Tadataka|1=Inō Tadataka}}, a surveyor (born {{ill|1745|en|1745|qid=Q7586|lt=1745|1=1745}}). * {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|qid=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū|1=Bunkyū}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1863|en|1863|qid=Q7701|lt=1863|1=1863}} {{ill|May 30|en|May 30|qid=Q2590|lt=May 30|1=May 30}}) – {{ill|Kiyokawa Hachirō|ja|清河八郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyokawa Hachirō|1=Kiyokawa Hachirō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q129812}} and the formation of the {{ill|Rōshigumi|en|Rōshigumi|qid=Q9325936|lt=Rōshigumi|1=Rōshigumi}}, the precursor to the {{ill|Shinsengumi|en|Shinsengumi|qid=Q221031|lt=Shinsengumi|1=Shinsengumi}} (born {{ill|1830|en|1830|qid=Q7576|lt=1830|1=1830}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|4|12|4|14|3|13|5|4|0413|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[cdo:4 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[de:April 13 (Lunisolar)]]
[[ko:음력 4월 13일]] [[ja:4月13日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:四月十三]]
[[ar:April 13 (Lunisolar)]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:4 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:四月十三]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:4 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:四月十三]]
